prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约10117名、9851名、10565名、11234名、12532名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2021→2022年略有前移，但2022→2025年 连续四年后移，累计后移约2681名；2025年基准位次约12532名，较2024年后移约1298名，后移幅度为近年最大；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021–2022年均为 20人，2023年增至22人，2024年23人，2025年25人，2026年（招生计划文件）进一步增至26人，连续四年小幅扩招。2026年较2025年扩招1人（+4%），扩招幅度有限，对竞争缓解 作用不大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 暨南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜2026年排名第59名（2025年第55名、2024年第51名），近年排名略有波动但整体稳定在中 位211水平，综合实力位于全国前60；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及宿舍楼安装安检设施等校园管理事件，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第41位（较 热），短视频平台曝光度处于中上水平，反映报考关注度尚可；2021–2025年均无投档断档或录取异常记录，招生稳定性较好；第五轮学科评估中，新闻传播学 获评A、工商管理获评A、应用经济学A-、中国语言文学A-、生物学A-、药学A-，共6个A-及以上学科，学科实力在211高校中较为突出，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 暨南大学位于广东广；上海考生对珠三角高校的地域偏好总体平稳；2026年专业热度数据显示，电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化、口腔医学等专业为高热推荐或推荐，与该校招生专业（电气工程、光电信息、口腔医学等）高度 契合，有利于吸引高分考生；但新闻传播学（明显劝退）、工商管理/商科（明显劝退）等专业社会热度偏低，可能对部分专业组位次产生下拉作用。本省2026年高考考生总数约6 6700人，较2025年49276人大幅增加约35.4%，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+4% ）、本省考生总数大幅增加约35%以及学校声誉中性偏稳等因素，2026年竞争预计进一步加剧。，叠加考生总数暴增带来的 额外竞争压力，预测最低录取位次约12953名，较2025年12532名后移约421名；波动区间12453–13453名。

- 会计学（全英语教学）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约12953名，区间12453–13453名。位次在区间下限（12453名）附近可重点冲刺一档的口腔医学和会计学（全英语教学）；位次在区间中段（约12953名）建议以二档的 电气工程、光电信息、药学等专业为主攻方向，兼顾经济统计学；位次在区间上限（13453名）附近或以外，建议以三档专业保底，其中汉语国际教育（中国语言文学A-）学科实 力较强可优先考虑。新闻传播类和工商管理类社会热度偏低，报考时需结合个人兴趣与就业预期综合判断。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Comprehensive category in Shanghai were approximately 10117, 9851, 10565, 11234, and 12532, showing a fluctuating but overall backward trend. There was a slight forward shift from 2021 to 2022, but from 2022 to 2025, it moved backward for four consecutive years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2681 places. The baseline ranking in 2025 was about 12532, a backward shift of about 1298 places compared to 2024, the largest backward shift in recent years. The university's enrollment plan for the Comprehensive category in Shanghai was 20 students from 2021 to 2022, increased to 22 in 2023, 23 in 2024, 25 in 2025, and further increased to 26 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), with four consecutive years of slight expansion. The expansion from 2025 to 2026 is 1 student (+4%), a limited expansion that has little effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranked 59th (55th in 2025, 51st in 2024), with slight fluctuations in recent years but overall stable at the mid-level 211 level, with comprehensive strength in the top 60 nationally. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management incidents such as the installation of security inspection facilities in dormitory buildings, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 41st (relatively hot), with short video platform exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate application attention. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of enrollment gaps or admission anomalies, indicating good enrollment stability. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Journalism and Communication was rated A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, and Pharmacy A-, with a total of 6 disciplines rated A- or above. The discipline strength is relatively prominent among 211 universities, which has a certain appeal for applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong. Shanghai candidates' regional preference for universities in the Pearl River Delta is generally stable. In 2026, major popularity data shows that majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Stomatology are highly recommended or recommended, which highly matches the university's enrollment majors (Electrical Engineering, Optoelectronic Information, Stomatology, etc.), helping to attract high-scoring candidates. However, majors such as Journalism and Communication (clearly discouraged), Business Administration/Business (clearly discouraged) have low social popularity, which may have a downward pull on the rankings of some major groups. The total number of candidates in the province for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 66,700, a significant increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, leading to intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+4%), the significant increase of about 35% in the total number of candidates in the province, and the neutral and stable school reputation, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026. Combined with the additional competitive pressure from the surge in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum admission ranking is about 12953, a backward shift of about 421 places compared to 12532 in 2025; the fluctuation range is 12453–13453.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Stomatology (No color blindness, color weakness)
- Accounting (Full English instruction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Pharmacy (Full English instruction, no color blindness, color weakness)
- Food Science and Engineering
- Economic Statistics
- Applied Chemistry.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Information Management and Information Systems
- Chinese International Education
- International Business (International Class)
- International Journalism and Communication (Full English instruction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 12953, with a range of 12453–13453. Candidates with rankings near the lower limit of the range (12453) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Stomatology and Accounting (Full English instruction). Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 12953) are advised to target Tier 2 majors such as Electrical Engineering, Optoelectronic Information, and Pharmacy as the main direction, while also considering Economic Statistics. Candidates with rankings near or above the upper limit of the range (13453) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, among which Chinese International Education (Chinese Language and Literature A-) has strong discipline strength and can be prioritized. Journalism and Communication and Business Administration majors have low social popularity, so candidates should combine personal interests and employment expectations for comprehensive judgment when applying.
